categories.name: Free Tier APIs
categories.description: Providers offering legitimate free tiers with official API access. Includes platforms with free quotas, trial credits, and promotional offerings.

categories.name: OpenAI-Compatible APIs
categories.description: API gateways and services that provide OpenAI-compatible endpoints. These allow easy migration and integration for developers familiar with the OpenAI API format.

categories.name: Self-Hosted / Open Source
categories.description: Open-source models and self-hostable solutions that run on your own infrastructure. Provides full control over data and configuration.

categories.name: Experimental / Daily Free Access
categories.description: Providers offering experimental features or daily free access as promotional offerings. Terms and availability may change frequently.
